title: Traveler's Muse
description: A simple modpack focused on saturating the adventures you embark on, through non-invasive Vanilla-like mods.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a3f9da5b85e5d045735f8b1e5fbcc82b779d471.png)A simple modpack focused on saturating the adventures you embark on, through non-invasive Vanilla-like mods.

This modpack has been compiled to offer a more immersive and exciting way of discovering the world of Minecraft. Not only does this pack have mods that improve the visuals of the game, but it also features mods that improve how you explore and traverse the environment. Most mods have highly configurable setting menus and allow extensive customization tailored to every playstyle and experience.

The pack features mods like "Traveler's Backpack" and "Realistic Campfires", turning your trips from point A to point B into something much more intriguing, rather than them feeling like boring chores. When surrounded by nature you can experience high-quality soundscapes provided by mods such as "Ambient Sounds" and "Sound Physics Remastered". At night, the sky lights up with beautiful stars, while the monsters emerge from the ground as seen in the mods "Astrocraft" and "Spawn Animations".

All in all, the pack aims to make Minecraft feel more alive and real, while not adding ridiculous amounts of new blocks and items. I hope you enjoy this pack, however you want.
